query:
ALTER TABLE opsec_items 
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS isDefault BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS notes TEXT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS dueDate TIMESTAMP NULL;
